dimensions.name: APPL_F_SIGNNC_XS
dimensions.transform: CASE WHEN ("APPL_F_SIGNNC_CLX" = 1 OR "APPL_F_SIGNNC_CCX" = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

dimensions.name: F_ACT_PCB_XS
dimensions.transform: CASE WHEN ("PCB_ACT_PROD_GR" = '4. Inactive pcb') THEN '2. Non-Active PCB (CL/CC)' ELSE '1. Active PCB (CL/CC)' END

dimensions.name: HIST_PROD_XS_GR
dimensions.transform: CASE WHEN ("HIST_PROD_GR" = '2. Has CC & CL') THEN '1. Cash & Card' WHEN ("HIST_PROD_GR" = '3. Has CL (wo CC)') THEN '2. Cash only' WHEN ("HIST_PROD_GR" = '4. Has CC (wo CL)') THEN '3. Card only' ELSE '4. Others' END

measures.name: # Client
measures.formula: count(distinct "ID_CUID")
measures.dax: DISTINCTCOUNT(v_pcb_cvm_client[ID_CUID])

measures.name: # Client submit BOD1 XS
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "APPL_F_BOD1_BOD2_SUBMIT" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[APPL_F_BOD1_BOD2_SUBMIT] = 1))

measures.name: # Client approved BOD1 XS
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "APPL_F_BOD1_BOD2_APPROVE" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[APPL_F_BOD1_BOD2_APPROVE] = 1))

measures.name: # Client login
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "HAPPY_CNT_LOGIN" > 0 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[HAPPY_CNT_LOGIN] > 0))

measures.name: # Client eli CLX
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "OFFER_F_ELI_CLX" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[OFFER_F_ELI_CLX] = 1))

measures.name: # Client eli CCX
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "OFFER_F_ELI_CCX" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[OFFER_F_ELI_CCX] = 1))

measures.name: # Client eli XS
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "OFFER_F_ELI_XS" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[OFFER_F_ELI_XS] = 1))

measures.name: # Client submit BOD0 XS
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "SCOR_F_BOD0_SUBMIT" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[SCOR_F_BOD0_SUBMIT] = 1))

measures.name: # Client approved BOD0 XS
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "SCOR_F_BOD0_APPROVED" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[SCOR_F_BOD0_APPROVED] = 1))

measures.name: # Client prime digital
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "STAGE_F_DIGITAL_PRIME" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[STAGE_F_DIGITAL_PRIME] = 1))

measures.name: # Client has exp. CC
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "PCB_F_HAS_CC_ANY_LENDER_BEFORE" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_HAS_CC_ANY_LENDER_BEFORE] = 1))

measures.name: # Client has exp. CL
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "PCB_F_HAS_CL_ANY_LENDER_BEFORE" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_HAS_CL_ANY_LENDER_BEFORE] = 1))

measures.name: % Client submit BOD1 XS
measures.formula: ({# Client submit BOD1 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client submit BOD1 XS], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client approved BOD1 XS
measures.formula: ({# Client approved BOD1 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client approved BOD1 XS], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client login
measures.formula: ({# Client login}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client login], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client eli CLX
measures.formula: ({# Client eli CLX}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client eli CLX], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client eli CCX
measures.formula: ({# Client eli CCX}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client eli CCX], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client eli XS
measures.formula: ({# Client eli XS}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client eli XS], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client submit BOD0 XS
measures.formula: ({# Client submit BOD0 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client submit BOD0 XS], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client approved BOD0 XS
measures.formula: ({# Client approved BOD0 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client approved BOD0 XS], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client prime digital
measures.formula: ({# Client prime digital}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client prime digital], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client has exp. CC
measures.formula: ({# Client has exp. CC}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client has exp. CC], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client has exp. CL
measures.formula: ({# Client has exp. CL}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client has exp. CL], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client BOD1 approval rate XS
measures.formula: ({# Client approved BOD1 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client submit BOD1 XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client approved BOD1 XS], [# Client submit BOD1 XS])

measures.name: % Client BOD0 approval rate XS
measures.formula: ({# Client approved BOD0 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client submit BOD0 XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client approved BOD0 XS], [# Client submit BOD0 XS])

measures.name: # Client signnc XS
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN ("APPL_F_SIGNNC_CLX" = 1 OR "APPL_F_SIGNNC_CCX" = 1) THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[APPL_F_SIGNNC_CLX] = 1 || v_pcb_cvm_client[APPL_F_SIGNNC_CCX] = 1))

measures.name: % Client BOD0 submit/Eli XS
measures.formula: ({# Client submit BOD0 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client eli XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client submit BOD0 XS], [# Client eli XS])

measures.name: % Client signnc XS/Eli XS
measures.formula: ({# Client signnc XS}) / NULLIF({# Client eli XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client signnc XS], [# Client eli XS])

measures.name: % Client BOD1/BOD0 approved XS
measures.formula: ({# Client approved BOD1 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client approved BOD0 XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client approved BOD1 XS], [# Client approved BOD0 XS])

measures.name: Hist. Total signnc contract
measures.formula: sum("HIST_CNT_SIGNNC_CONTRACT")
measures.dax: SUM(v_pcb_cvm_client[HIST_CNT_SIGNNC_CONTRACT])

measures.name: Hist. Total signnc CL
measures.formula: sum("HIST_CNT_SIGNNC_CL")
measures.dax: SUM(v_pcb_cvm_client[HIST_CNT_SIGNNC_CL])

measures.name: Hist. Total signnc POS
measures.formula: sum("HIST_CNT_SIGNNC_POS")
measures.dax: SUM(v_pcb_cvm_client[HIST_CNT_SIGNNC_POS])

measures.name: Hist. Avg contract per client
measures.formula: ({Hist. Total signnc contract}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([Hist. Total signnc contract], [# Client])

measures.name: Avg. Happy login per client
measures.formula: (sum("HAPPY_CNT_LOGIN")) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE(SUM(v_pcb_cvm_client[HAPPY_CNT_LOGIN]), [# Client])

measures.name: # Client login w advanced act
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "HAPPY_F_ADVANCE_ACTION" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[HAPPY_F_ADVANCE_ACTION] = 1))

measures.name: % Client login w advanced act/Login
measures.formula: ({# Client login w advanced act}) / NULLIF({# Client login}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client login w advanced act], [# Client login])

measures.name: % Client login w advanced act
measures.formula: ({# Client login w advanced act}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client login w advanced act], [# Client])

measures.name: # Client repay happy
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "HAPPY_F_REPAYMENT" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[HAPPY_F_REPAYMENT] = 1))

measures.name: # Client login w bio
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "HAPPY_F_LOGIN_BIO" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[HAPPY_F_LOGIN_BIO] = 1))

measures.name: # Client BOD0 via happy XS
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "HAPPY_F_BOD0_GMA" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[HAPPY_F_BOD0_GMA] = 1))

measures.name: % Client repay happy/Client login
measures.formula: ({# Client repay happy}) / NULLIF({# Client login}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client repay happy], [# Client login])

measures.name: % Client login w bio/Client login
measures.formula: ({# Client login w bio}) / NULLIF({# Client login}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client login w bio], [# Client login])

measures.name: % Client BOD0 via happy XS/Client login
measures.formula: ({# Client BOD0 via happy XS}) / NULLIF({# Client login}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client BOD0 via happy XS], [# Client login])

measures.name: % Client repay happy
measures.formula: ({# Client repay happy}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client repay happy], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client login w bio
measures.formula: ({# Client login w bio}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client login w bio], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client BOD0 via happy XS
measures.formula: ({# Client BOD0 via happy XS}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client BOD0 via happy XS], [# Client])

measures.name: # Client prime
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "STAGE_F_PRIME" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[STAGE_F_PRIME] = 1))

measures.name: # Client remain prime
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "STAGE_PRIME_GR" = '4. Remain Prime' THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[STAGE_PRIME_GR] = "4. Remain Prime"))

measures.name: # Client remain prime-digital
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "STAGE_PRIME_GR" = '1. Remain Digi Prime' THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[STAGE_PRIME_GR] = "1. Remain Digi Prime"))

measures.name: % Client remain prime
measures.formula: ({# Client remain prime}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client remain prime], v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client])

measures.name: % Client remain prime-digital
measures.formula: ({# Client remain prime-digital}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client remain prime-digital], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client signnc XS
measures.formula: ({# Client signnc XS}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client signnc XS], v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client])

measures.name: % Client BOD1/Eli XS
measures.formula: ({# Client approved BOD1 XS}) / NULLIF({# Client submit BOD1 XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client approved BOD1 XS], [# Client submit BOD1 XS])

measures.name: # Client signnc CLX
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "APPL_F_SIGNNC_CLX" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE(v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client],FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[APPL_F_SIGNNC_CLX]=1))

measures.name: # Client signnc CCX
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN "APPL_F_SIGNNC_CCX" = 1 THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE(v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client],FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[APPL_F_SIGNNC_CCX]=1))

measures.name: % Client signnc CLX
measures.formula: ({# Client signnc CLX}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client signnc CLX], v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client])

measures.name: % Client signnc CCX
measures.formula: ({# Client signnc CCX}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client signnc CCX], v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client])

measures.name: % Client signnc XS/Approved BOD0
measures.formula: ({# Client signnc XS}) / NULLIF({# Client approved BOD0 XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client signnc XS], v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client approved BOD0 XS])

measures.name: % Client signnc CLX/Approved BOD0
measures.formula: ({# Client signnc CLX}) / NULLIF({# Client approved BOD0 XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client signnc CLX], v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client approved BOD0 XS])

measures.name: % Client signnc CCX/Approved BOD0
measures.formula: ({# Client signnc CCX}) / NULLIF({# Client approved BOD0 XS}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client signnc CCX], v_pcb_cvm_client[# Client approved BOD0 XS])

measures.name: # Client act XS PCB
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN ((("PCB_F_ACT_CARD_BANK" = 1 OR "PCB_F_ACT_CARD_FI" = 1) OR "PCB_F_ACT_CASH_BANK" = 1) OR "PCB_F_ACT_CASH_FI" = 1) THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_ACT_CARD_BANK] = 1 || v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_ACT_CARD_FI] = 1 || v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_ACT_CASH_BANK] = 1 || v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_ACT_CASH_FI] = 1))

measures.name: # Client act XS with BANK
measures.formula: count(distinct CASE WHEN ("PCB_F_ACT_CARD_BANK" = 1 OR "PCB_F_ACT_CASH_BANK" = 1) THEN "ID_CUID" END)
measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_ACT_CARD_BANK] = 1 || v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_ACT_CASH_BANK] = 1))

measures.name: # Client act XS with FI

measures.dax: CALCULATE([# Client], FILTER(v_pcb_cvm_client, v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_ACT_CARD_FI] = 1 || v_pcb_cvm_client[PCB_F_ACT_CASH_FI] = 1))

measures.name: % Client act XS with BANK
measures.formula: ({# Client act XS with BANK}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client act XS with BANK], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client act XS with FI
measures.formula: ({# Client act XS with FI}) / NULLIF({# Client}, 0)
measures.dax: DIVIDE([# Client act XS with FI], [# Client])

measures.name: % Client act XS with BANK/act XS PCB

measures.name: % Client act XS with FI/act XS PCB
